name: Rustic Fish Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1/4 inch dice (about 1 cup)
1 small zucchini, cut into 1/4 inch cubes (about 1 cup)
14.5 oz. can Italian-style diced tomatoes with juice
1 lb Tilapia fillets, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large, non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Sauté onion and garlic for 3 minutes, until just starting to soften.
3. Add bell pepper, zucchini, thyme, salt, and pepper; sauté for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Stir in diced tomatoes with their juice, clam juice, and wine. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Add fish fillets and simmer for 3-5 minutes, until fish is cooked through.
7. Serve the stew in shallow soup bowls with crusty bread.
